Services include: individual, family, and group counseling, medication evaluation and management, psychological testing, and assistance in accessing community resources. 2074 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm. 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays of the month closed from noon-2pm. Email (541) 851-8110 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides grief support in a group setting. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st and 3rd Thursdays of the month 6pm-7:30pm Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE GRIEF TRAVELERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing 4 week series for 6-10 participants with weekly 60 minute group sessions. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers extended grief and bereavement counseling programs two times a year in the spring and fall. Sessions run for 12 weeks up to 12 months depending on the needs of the group. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE TEEN GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe place for teenagers to come and deal with various issues related to grief. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Ages 11-17. Participants must commit to four weeks of the program. Some age exceptions are permitted depending on the maturity of the child. Also provides specialized information and referrals. 213 NE 10th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (971) 228-2020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH GRIEF RELEASE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a 5-week grief class led by a nationally certified Bereavement Facilitator. Four sessions per year. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who have experienced any type of loss; a loved one through death or divorce, a job, a relationship, reputation, self-esteem, health, identity, etc. Hours: Thursday 6:30pm-8:30pm Email (503) 638-5900 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRUCARE PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential services to anyone experiencing a pregnancy. Provides a holistic care platform addressing, but not limited to, the following: pregnancy testing and confirmation with ultrasound, medically based shared decision making, peer-based shared decision making, nurse consultation(s), personal development consultations, classes for family and relationship optimization, prenatal classes, parenting training, and pregnancy loss appointments related to decisional regret, miscarriage, stillbirth, and infant loss. Does not provide referrals to abortion services. 1155 W Linda Avenue Suite B Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday noon-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-2pm Email (541) 567-2393 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WESTSIDE CHURCH GRIEF SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 13 week support group for those going through the process of grieving.
